production_note: agentic_K2 dual-LLM explorer: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# k2 explorer · S39-T1-A-E1
CANON = ["intake", "er", "relation_graph", "features", "model_score", "queue"]
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T1A",
    "stages": list(CANON),
    "label_space": "needs_review",
    "auto_fraud": False,
}
meets = (
    record["stages"] == CANON
    and record["label_space"] == "needs_review"
    and record["auto_fraud"] is False
)
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_STAGE_ORDER"
print("S39-T1-A", status)
exercises.justification_from_packet: Exploré «Responsible ML Case Triage y cierre de nivel» en el quiz_card K2: S39-T1-A-E1. Enunciado: «S39-T1-A-E1 · Valida el contrato del pipeline canónico N3 sobre `CASO-LIM-039-T1A`. Entrada: dict con stages (lista ordenada), label_space y auto_frau». invertí el predicado defectuoso cuando la instrucción pedía PASS del contrato. Conceptos del paquete: explorer, S39, CANON, intake. Salida: ['print("S39-T1-A", status)']. exercises.code:
# k2 explorer · S39-T2-A-E1
packet = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2A",
    "score": 0.81,
    "evidence": ["shared_phone_synth"],
    "graph_path": ["E1", "ph:900", "E2"],
}
meets = (
    bool(packet.get("case_id"))
    and "score" in packet
    and isinstance(packet.get("evidence"), list)
    and len(packet["evidence"]) > 0
    and isinstance(packet.get("graph_path"), list)
    and len(packet["graph_path"]) > 0
)
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_PACKET_INCOMPLETE"
print("S39-T2-A", status)

exercises.code:
# k2 explorer · S39-T2-B-E1
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2B",
    "score": 0.9,
    "threshold": 0.7,
    "human_action": "skip",
}
auto = "queue" if record["score"] >= record["threshold"] else "skip"
final = record["human_action"] if record["human_action"] is not None else auto
override = record["human_action"] is not None and record["human_action"] != auto
meets = final == "skip" and override is True
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_OVERRIDE"
print("S39-T2-B", status)

# k2 explorer · S39-T3-A-E1

    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T3A",
    "pii_minimized": True,
    "rbac": True,

    "slice_metrics": True,

}

    checklist["pii_minimized"],
    checklist["rbac"],
    not checklist["secrets_in_repo"],
    checklist["slice_metrics"],
    checklist["input_limits"],
])
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_RELEASE"
print("S39-T3-A", status)
